context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses Hydrogen's storefront.query with appropriate caching strategies, proper import paths, TypeScript-tagged GraphQL queries, Hydrogen-specific components, and localization directives when building Hydrogen route files.

checklist.name: storefront.query usage
checklist.description: Uses `storefront.query(QUERY, { variables, cache })` to fetch data from the Storefront API (not a raw fetch or GraphQL client)

checklist.name: CacheLong for catalog data
checklist.description: Applies `storefront.CacheLong()` to at least one query for catalog/collection data (product lists or collection metadata)

checklist.name: CacheShort for inventory data
checklist.description: Applies `storefront.CacheShort()` to a query involving product availability or inventory-sensitive fields

checklist.name: CacheNone for personalized data
checklist.description: Uses `storefront.CacheNone()` for any customer-specific or personalized query (if present)

checklist.name: GraphQL queries tagged as const
checklist.description: All GraphQL query template literals are suffixed with `as const`

checklist.name: Queries colocated with routes
checklist.description: GraphQL query strings are defined in the same file as their loader (not imported from a separate queries file)

checklist.name: 404 handling via Response throw
checklist.description: Throws `new Response('Not Found', { status: 404 })` (or equivalent) when a product/collection is not found, rather than returning null

checklist.name: Hydrogen Image component
checklist.description: Uses Hydrogen's `` component (from '@shopify/hydrogen') for rendering product or collection images, not a plain `` tag

checklist.name: Hydrogen Money component
checklist.description: Uses Hydrogen's `<Money>` component (from '@shopify/hydrogen') for rendering prices, not manual string formatting

checklist.name: @inContext directive for localization
checklist.description: At least one GraphQL query uses the `@inContext` directive with `language` and/or `country` variables for localized prices or content
